calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar May-31-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: J. Willis,
CSR: B. Fields, #7235

DANIEL BORNSTEIN, ESQ for PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK.
No appearance by Defendant STEVEN VERA.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for Judgment as follows:

Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 643 MANGELS AVE., SF, CA
The lease is forfeited.
RENTS & DAMAGES FOR - $6100.00
Costs - PER MEMO OF COSTS
Total - $6100.00

COURT SIGNS JUDGMENT PREPARED BY MR. BORNSTEIN.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-31-2011 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-26-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 514 Judge: Ellen Chaitin; Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha; Not Reported.
Appearances:

Daniel Bornstein, Esq. for PLAINTIFF Wells Fargo Bank, N.A.

A. Farmer, Esq. representing the Defendant Steven Vera through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 504-B, for settlement discussions.

Case did not settle, trial date confirmed.
